editsTz: Edits are applied in the selected time zone
title: Title
authDeepLinkNoCode: Sign-in failed: no code in callback
authMissingParams: Missing auth params in callback (no code or access_token)
authCallbackMissingCodeOrTokens: Auth callback missing code or tokens
authNotConfigured: Sign-in not configured (missing Supabase URL or key)
upgradeToUnlock: Upgrade to unlock more uploads and metadata generation.
upgradeRequiredForUploadScheduleBanner: Your plan ({{plan}}) is inactive. Renew or upgrade to enable upload and scheduling. Renewal: {{renewsOn}}
signInToEnableUploadSchedule: Sign in with Google to enable upload and scheduling.
signInNotConfigured: Sign-in not configured. Set VITE_SUPABASE_URL and VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY in .env
dragDropFormats: Supported formats: MP4, MOV, AVI, MKV, WEBM, FLV, WMV, M4V
noVideoFiles: No video files found. Supported formats: mp4, mov, avi, mkv, webm, flv, wmv, m4v
tooltipAdd: Add video files or folders to the list
tooltipGenerate: Generate metadata (title, description, hashtags) for selected videos using AI
tooltipAutoSchedule: Automatically assign publish times based on schedule settings
tooltipAutoPlan: Automatically assign publish times using the current schedule defaults (videos/day, times, time zone)
tooltipAutoUpload: Enable automatic upload scheduler. YouTube: full auto. Instagram/TikTok: manual assist
tooltipSilentMode: Silent mode: Only show Assist overlay, don't open browser automatically (prevents interruption)
savedMetadataTooltip: Open saved metadata templates and apply them to the selected item(s).
silentModeOnDesc: Silent mode ON: No automatic opening. Browser/Explorer/Clipboard will NOT run automatically. Use the overlay button to open the next assist.
silentModeOffDesc: Silent mode OFF: Automatic assist will open Browser + Explorer and copy metadata when jobs are due (overlay can still be used).
tooltipRecalculate: Recalculate publish times for all videos based on current sort order and schedule settings
tooltipApplyPlan: Apply plan to unscheduled items based on current sort order
tooltipConnectYouTube: Connect your YouTube account to enable automatic uploads
tooltipUploadYouTube: Upload selected video to YouTube immediately
tooltipOpenExports: Open exports folder for this platform
tooltipRemove: Remove this video from the list
tooltipSort: Sort videos by name, creation date, or added order
diagnosticsExportUnavailable: Diagnostics export is not available in this build.
diagnosticsSupportBundleHint: Creates a folder on your Desktop (or Downloads) with app info and redacted logs. No passwords or API keys are included.
developerModeWarning: Warning: Developer mode features are for advanced users only. Use with caution.
debugModeDescription: Enable verbose logging and debug information in console
autoCleanupOutputReportsHelper: Automatically deletes report files older than 30 days.
autoCleanOutputArtifactsHelper: Deletes Audio/Exports/Metadata/Transcripts files older than N days from the outputs folder.
autoCleanArtifactsWarning: This affects only files inside the outputs folder. Originals are not deleted.
moveOutputsFolderBody: Files will be copied to the new location. Optionally delete the files from the old location after verifying everything works.
moveOutputsFolderDeleteCheckbox: Delete files from the old location after move
resetOutputsFolderBody: Outputs path will be reset to the default location. Files will be copied to the default location. Optionally delete the files from the old location after verifying everything works.
outputsFolderHelper: Choose where pipeline outputs, exports, and reports are saved.
moveExistingOutputsBody1: We can copy your existing outputs to the new folder.
moveExistingOutputsBody2: If you enable deletion, files will be removed only from the old folder after copying.
moveExistingOutputsDeleteCheckbox: Delete files from the old folder after copying
moveExistingOutputsDeleteHelper: Your files will remain in the new folder.
resetOutputsBody1: This will reset the outputs folder to the default location.
resetOutputsBody2: You can optionally copy existing outputs to the default folder.
resetOutputsDeleteCheckbox: Delete files from the current folder after copying
resetOutputsDeleteHelper: Files will remain in the default folder.
outputsMigrationSomeLocked: Moved outputs. Some files could not be removed from the old folder (in use). You can delete them later.
computeBackendHelper: ClipCast runs the Python pipeline on CPU or GPU when available. These options affect transcription (Whisper). Using GPU makes transcription faster.
computeBackendGpuUnavailable: GPU not available in the selected Python / Conda environment.
pythonPathHelper: Set a custom Python path if the pipeline can't find Python automatically.
useGenerateButtonAbove: Use the "Generate metadata" button above to create metadata.
noExportForPlatform: No export generated for this platform.
exportFileNotFoundOpenedFolder: Export file not found. Opened folder instead.
revealFileMovedOrRenamed: File was moved or renamed. Re-import it from the new location.
appliesOnlyToUnscheduled: Applies only to items without manually set times
selectTargetsDescription: Select which platforms to target for the selected items
deleteMetadataConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {{platform}} metadata?
customInstructionsPlaceholder: Enter custom instructions for metadata generation (e.g., "Use a more casual tone", "Focus on educational value")...
customInstructionsDescription: Provide custom instructions to guide AI metadata generation. These instructions will be added to the default prompt.
customInstructionsHint: Example: "Make titles more engaging and click-worthy", "Use emojis in descriptions", "Focus on SEO keywords"
templatePlaceholders: Placeholders: {TITLE} {DESCRIPTION} {HASHTAGS} {CTA} {LINKS} {DISCLAIMER}. Missing placeholders are not injected.
appSubtitle: Manage and schedule your video uploads
addVideosDescription: Select video files OR select a folder (we will scan it for videos).
addVideosTip: Windows can't select files and folders in one native dialog, so we show two options here.
autoUploadNote: Affects all future imports • Requires app running • PC must be awake
datePickerHelper: Click calendar icon to select a date
autoPlanDefaultsHint: Uses this Plan's settings as defaults for future imports.
slotsPerDayHelper: Automatically synced with number of times
timesInputHelper: Enter times separated by spaces or commas (24h format)
multipleJobsPerVideoHelper: Allow scheduling multiple publish times for the same video
conflictDetectionHelper: Warn if scheduled times overlap or are too close together
scheduleManualAssistInfo: This will open {{platform}} in your browser and copy metadata to clipboard. You can then paste it and upload the video manually.
scheduleManualAssistYouTubeInfo: This will open YouTube upload page, copy metadata to clipboard, and open file in Explorer. You can then paste metadata and upload the video manually.
createScheduledJobHint: Create a scheduled upload job for this file
removeItemsDisclaimer: Items will be removed from the project but files will not be deleted from disk.
deleteMetadataConfirmBody: Are you sure you want to delete metadata?
noJobsDueNextHour: No jobs due in the next hour.
preloadNotLoaded: Preload did not load. Start with: {{command}}
filterAllItemsTooltip: Show all items regardless of status
filterNeedsActionTooltip: Items that need action: missing metadata, errors, or blocking warnings
filterReadyTooltip: Metadata is complete. Ready for scheduling or upload. Targets can be set later.
filterScheduledTooltip: Items scheduled for publication at a specific date/time. Waiting for scheduled time.
filterProcessingTooltip: Items currently being processed: pipeline running, upload in progress, or assist session active.
filterDoneTooltip: All selected platforms are completed. Posted successfully on all target platforms.
filterFailedTooltip: Items that failed: pipeline error, upload failed, or job runner error. Use Retry buttons to fix.
uploadFailedCheckLogs: Upload failed. Check logs for details.
pipelineFailedCheckLogs: Pipeline failed. Check logs for details.
pipelineRunning: Pipeline is running (transcript/metadata/export generation in progress).
scheduledForWithWait: Scheduled for {{date}}. Waiting for scheduled time.
metadataCompleteReady: Metadata is complete. Ready for scheduling or upload.
missingMetadataGenerateFirst: Missing metadata (title, description, hashtags). Generate metadata first.
actionRequiredCheckFile: Action required. Check file and metadata.
failedToUpdateMadeForKids: Failed to update made for kids
jobNotFoundRefresh: Job not found. Please refresh and try again.
jobNotFoundForFile: Job not found in current list. File: {{file}}
allSelectedFilesHaveMetadataForPlatforms: All selected files already have metadata for {{platforms}}
allSelectedFilesHaveMetadata: All selected files already have metadata
skippingExistingMetadata: Skipping {{skipped}} file(s) that already have metadata. Processing {{processing}} file(s)...
metadataSkippingBusy: Skipping {{skipped}} file(s) already processing or in queue. Processing {{processing}} file(s)...
metadataGenerationFailedWithCode: Metadata generation failed (code: {{code}}). Check Technical Log for details.
selectAtLeastOneVideoFile: Please select at least one video file
youtubeNotConnectedPrompt: YouTube not connected. Please connect YouTube first.
noCreditUsedOnFailure: No credit was used because the action failed.
youtubeUploadLimitReached: YouTube upload limit reached. Please wait or check your YouTube account limits.
youtubeUploadLimitReachedAll: YouTube upload limit reached for all videos. Please wait or check your YouTube account limits.
youtubeDailyLimitModalBody: YouTube prevented this upload because the channel hit its daily upload limit. This often happens for unverified channels. Verify your YouTube account to increase limits, or try again tomorrow.
youtubeDailyLimitUploadsPaused: Uploads paused: YouTube daily limit reached.
youtubeQuotaExceeded: YouTube API quota exceeded. Please try again later.
openedUserDataFolderWithHint: Opened userData folder. If you have legacy credentials, place google_oauth_client.json here to migrate.
selectAtLeastOneVideo: Please select at least one video
oauthCredentialsMissing: ⚠️ YouTube connection is not available yet on this device. Please try again or contact support.
oauthInvalidClientHelp: ❌ Error 401: invalid_client. Check: 1) OAuth client type = "Desktop app" (NOT "Web application"), 2) Client ID/Secret copied fully, 3) YouTube Data API v3 enabled, 4) OAuth consent screen configured. See GOOGLE_OAUTH_SETUP.md
allSelectedPlatformsHaveMetadataFor: All selected platforms already have metadata for {{platforms}}
allSelectedPlatformsHaveMetadata: All selected platforms already have metadata
openedMetadataFolderHint: Opened metadata folder. Edit .txt files directly.
assistTriggeredMarkedPosted: Assist triggered for {{platform}} - marked as posted
noFirstCommentFound: No first comment found in metadata
signInRequiredForUploadSchedule: Sign in with Google to upload or schedule videos.
upgradeRequiredForUploadSchedule: Your subscription is inactive. Upgrade to unlock upload and scheduling.
autoArchivePostedHelper: Moves posted rows to Archived after N days. Does not delete video files.
autoDeleteArchivedHelper: Deletes archived rows from the app after N days. Does not delete video files.
rowsRemovedFromApp: Rows removed from app (video files not deleted)
deleteRowFromAppBody: This removes the row from the app only. It does not delete video files or uploads.
